OpenClaw `node.invoke(browser.proxy)` bypasses `browser.request` persistent profile-mutation guard.

node.invoke(browser.proxy) could mutate persistent browser profiles through a path that bypassed the browser.request guard.

OpenClaw is a user-controlled local assistant. This advisory is scoped to the OpenClaw trust model and does not assume a multi-tenant service boundary.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<= v2026.04.01`
- Patched versions: `2026.4.8`

## Fix

The issue was fixed on `main` and is available in the patched npm version listed above. The verified fixed tree is commit `d7c3210cd6f5fdfdc1beff4c9541673e814354d5`.

## Verification

The fix was re-checked against `main` before publication, including targeted regression tests for the affected security boundary.

## Credits

Thanks @nicky-cc  of Tencent zhuque Lab ([https://github.com/Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard](https://github.com/Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard)) for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00258, "percentile": 0.16936}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cmfr-9m2r-xwhq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-09T17:34:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cmfr-9m2r-xwhq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cmfr-9m2r-xwhq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42431"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T19:37:47Z", "published_at": "2026-04-09T17:34:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-cmfr-9m2r-xwhq", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42431", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/d7c3210cd6f5fdfdc1beff4c9541673e814354d5", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-persistent-profile-mutation-via-node-invoke-browser-proxy-bypass", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cmfr-9m2r-xwhq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-cmfr-9m2r-xwhq", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw `node.invoke(browser.proxy)` bypasses `browser.request` persistent profile-mutation guard", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T02:41:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cmfr-9m2r-xwhq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw `node.invoke(browser.proxy)` bypasses `browser.request` persistent profile-mutation guard
